name: MSI PRO B860M-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8800(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 5G LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 (B860MAWIFI)
shortName: MSI PRO B860M-A WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x
description: Professional micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7.
